content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the diff and read the updated bead-claim flow in `src/cli/project.rs` together with the related controller/project linkage code in `src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`, and the existing CLI coverage in `tests/cli.rs`. I did not find correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the implementation. Verified with `cargo test` (all tests passed).

## Amendments

None.
